creator: pgiffuni@fps.biblos.unal.edu.co
text:
Scilab, An excellent math package for X environment developed by INRIA.

How-To-Repeat: The package is big, I just brought to date some available patches, it
doesnt have an installation script, so I left that job to someone that
 knows more about Makefiles than I do.
It is boring to compile (4 hr. aprox.) but it is a must for the ports tree.
The license should be signed by WC (no big deal).
